SELL YOUR RV FAST FOR CASH ANYWHERE IN THE USA

Same-day pick-up available. Free towing. No paperwork
Instant offer

Call us now (855) 547-1550

or email us to support@junkcarsus.com
Receive a guaranteed highest price quote for your junk car from the best junk car buyer by filling out the form online.
Book Online

We’re open

Mon-Fri: 8 am - 8 pm,

Sat: 8 am - 3 pm

Looking to sell my RV without wasting weeks on listings and calls? JunkCarsUs makes it easy to sell your RV for cash anywhere in the USA. We buy every type of RV, including a motorhome, recreational vehicle, used camper, and older units that no longer fit your plans. Our RV buyers provide a straightforward RV buying service with nationwide pickup and a towing service when needed. Whether you want to sell RV fast, complete an RV sale, or find trusted camper buyers, we help move the process forward without extra stress.
If you need cash for RV ownership that has become costly or unused, request an instant RV offer from our nationwide RV buyers. We offer free towing, free pickup, same day pickup in many areas, and a clear RV appraisal. Our nationwide service helps people who want to sell damaged RV fast, get cash for my camper, or sell RV online today.
From a used camper parked at home to a motorhome that no longer runs, we provide a cash offer backed by online RV buyers who understand the market. A quick camper sale should not feel complicated. JunkCarsUs keeps hassle-free RV selling simple, and we might even save you from mowing around that parked RV one more weekend.
Get Instant Cash offer
or Call us now (205) 315-8870

GET AN INSTANT CASH OFFER FOR YOUR RV

At JunkCarsUs, we make it easy to get an instant RV offer without wasting time on listings, calls, or uncertain buyers. If you want a cash offer for RV ownership, our team reviews your information and provides a fast response based on current RV pricing, vehicle condition, and market demand.

Whether you own a used camper, motorhome, travel trailer, or a junk RV, our RV cash buyers provide a straightforward solution. Start with an instant camper quote, and receive an accurate RV appraisal backed by real market data. Our online RV valuation process looks at mileage, age, condition, and features to determine a competitive valuation and realistic RV estimate.

We focus on fair offers that reflect fair market value, current resale value, and local market conditions. If your RV has damage, mechanical issues, or years of wear, we still provide an offer and explain how the appraisal was determined.

HOW OUR RV BUYING PROCESS WORKS

Sumbit your RV details
Tell us about your RV through our online form. The information helps us begin the RV selling process and prepare an accurate quote.
Receive your cash offer
Our team reviews the details and sends a cash offer for RV owners based on condition, market trends, and ownership information.
Schedule free RV pickup
Once you accept the offer, we arrange free pickup at a time that works for you. We also help with paperwork, inspection requirements, and title transfer details.
Get paid on the spot
When pickup is complete, you get paid immediately. It is a simple process designed for people who want to sell RV online and learn how to sell an RV without delays. Our step-by-step RV selling approach helps create a stress-free sale from start to finish.

WE BUY RVS IN ANY CONDITION

At JunkCarsUs, we buy RVs that other buyers pass on. If you need to sell a damaged RV, deal with a vehicle that no longer runs, or move a camper that has been sitting for years, our team is ready to help. Our junk RV buyers purchase RVs with major issues, and our non-running RV buyers work with owners who want a simple sale.

We buy units with engine problems, transmission damage, a salvage title, and signs of flood damage. We also purchase a non-running vehicle, a damaged camper, a wrecked RV, or a scrap RV. Free RV removal and RV towing are available in many areas.

  • Sell a Damaged RV
    Tell us about your RV through our online form. The information helps us begin the RV selling process and prepare an accurate quote.
  • Sell a Non-Running RV
    A failed engine often costs more to repair than the RV is worth. We buy RVs with engine damage and other major mechanical issues.
  • Sell an RV with Engine Problems
    A failed engine often costs more to repair than the RV is worth. We buy RVs with engine damage and other major mechanical issues.
  • Sell a Flood-damaged RV
    Flood exposure creates long-term problems. We purchase RVs affected by flood damage, electrical issues, and water-related deterioration.
  • Sell and Old camper or Motorhome
    Our old camper buyers and broken RV buyers purchase aging RVs regardless of mileage, appearance, or condition.
  • Sell a Salvage Title RV
    Our salvage RV buyers regularly purchase RVs with a salvage title, including units that have been declared a total loss.
  • Sell an RV without repairs
    Our salvage RV buyers regularly purchase RVs with a salvage title, including units that have been declared a total loss.

TYPES OF RVS WE BUY

  • CLASS A MOTORHOMES

    We buy Class A motorhomes in many conditions. Whether your Class A has mechanical issues, water damage, or high mileage, our RV buyers provide a fair cash offer.

  • CLASS B CAMPER VANS

    Class B camper vans remain popular, and we purchase them throughout the area. If you have a camper van that you no longer use, our camper buyers make the selling process straightforward.

  • CLASS C RVS

    We buy Class C RVs from private owners looking for a quick sale. Many sellers contact us when repairs become expensive or storage costs keep adding up.

  • FIFTH WHEELS

    Our team purchases fifth wheel RVs of different ages and sizes. If your fifth wheel needs work or has been parked for years, we are interested.

  • TRAVEL TRAILERS

    Travel trailer owners often reach out when they want extra space at home or fewer maintenance responsibilities. We buy travel trailers in running and non-running condition.

  • TOY HAULERS

    We buy toy hauler models used for recreation, work, and travel. A toy hauler with cosmetic damage or missing parts still has value.

  • POP-UP CAMPERS

    If you have a pop-up camper that no longer gets used, we can help. We buy many pop-up camper models and offer a simple selling experience.

  • DIESEL PUSHERS

    We also purchase diesel pusher motorhomes. From older diesel pusher units to newer models with repair needs, our RV buyers are ready to make an offer.

HOW MUCH IS MY RV WORTH?

If you're asking, “how much is my RV worth?”, you're not alone. Many owners want a clear RV value before selling a used RV or junk RV. At JunkCarsUs, we provide a straightforward RV appraisal based on real market conditions, not guesswork.

An accurate RV valuation looks at more than age alone. We review camper value, motorhome value, RV resale value, and current resale pricing to give you a fair RV estimate. We also compare available data from NADA and Kelley Blue Book when relevant.

RV Type Avg. Weight (lbs) Scrap Value Salvage RV Value Cash Offer Range
Truck Camper 2,500–4,000 $200–$450 $500–$1,500 $500–$2,000
Pop-Up Camper 1,500–3,500 $125–$400 $300–$1,200 $300–$1,500
Travel Trailer 3,000–8,000 $250–$900 $800–$3,500 $800–$5,000
Fifth Wheel 7,000–20,000 $600–$2,200 $1,500–$7,000 $1,500–$8,000
Class B Camper Van 8,000–11,000 $700–$1,200 $2,000–$8,000 $2,000–$12,000
Class C Motorhome 12,000–16,000 $1,000–$1,800 $3,000–$12,000 $3,000–$18,000
Super C Motorhome 19,000–26,000 $1,600–$3,000 $5,000–$20,000 $5,000–$25,000
Class A Gas Motorhome 18,000–24,000 $1,500–$2,700 $4,000–$20,000 $4,000–$25,000
Class A Diesel Pusher 30,000–40,000 $2,500–$4,500 $8,000–$40,000 $8,000–$45,000
Luxury Motorcoach 42,000–54,000 $3,500–$6,000 $15,000–$75,000 $15,000–$75,000+

What Affects RV Resale Value?

  • RV Age: RV age has a direct impact on RV resale value. Older units often experience more depreciation, which affects the market price.

  • Assess and document the auto’s condition: Evaluate the car's condition and take clear pictures highlighting both its strengths and any damage. This transparency helps in attracting potential buyers. To make your vehicle look better and make it fetch higher value, you might want to spruce it up by cleaning it or even doing some minor repairs or improvements;

  • Advertise online and offline: Utilize online platforms like specialized websites, social media, and automotive forums to reach a wider audience. You can also place "For Sale" signs on the car itself to inform your neighborhood about your decision to get rid of a vehicle;

  • Promptly respond to inquiries: Be attentive to calls, messages, or emails from interested parties. Provide them with accurate detailc about the car's condition and answer any questions they may have. Only by showing you are interested in selling and treating potential customers with due diligence you can count on getting $1,000 cash for junk cars;

  • Negotiate to close the deal: Once you've found a buyer, negotiate the price and terms of the sale. Ensure you both have a clear agreement in writing to avoid any misunderstandings. Transfer the title and provide a receipt once the transaction is complete.

HOW WE CALCULATE RV VALUE

Our team reviews RV age, mileage, condition, upgrades, maintenance history, ownership history, depreciation trends, and current market demand. We use that information to prepare an RV appraisal that reflects today's market.

GET A FREE RV VALUATION

Need an RV estimate before you sell? Contact JunkCarsUs for a free RV valuation. We'll review your RV, discuss its trade-in value and RV resale value, and make a cash offer. If your RV has seen better days, don't worry. Some RVs retire from the road before their owners do.

Get Instant Cash offer
or Call us now (205) 315-8870

WHY CHOOSE US TO SELL YOUR RV?

Selling a used RV or junk RV should not feel like a second job. At JunkCarsUs, we make it simple to sell your RV for cash with honest service and clear communication from start to finish.
  • FREE NATIONWIDE RV PICKUP
    We offer free nationwide RV pickup, so there is no need to arrange transportation or pay towing costs. Our team works across the country, making us one of the nationwide RV buyers people trust when they need a straightforward sale.
  • FAST SAME-DAY CASH OFFERS
    Waiting days for answers gets old fast. Send us your RV details, and we provide a same-day cash offer whenever possible. Many sellers choose us because they want a fast payout without unnecessary delays.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES
    The amount we offer is the amount you receive. There are no surprise deductions, pickup charges, or extra fees added at the last minute.
  • LICENSED & TRUSTED RV BUYERS
    JunkCarsUs is a licensed and insured trusted company. Our team includes verified buyers who treat every customer with respect. People looking for trusted RV buyers, best RV buyers, and reliable nationwide RV buyers turn to us for a smooth experience.
  • WE BUY RVS AS-IS
    We buy RVs as-is, including older models, damaged RVs, non-running RVs, and junk RVs. No repairs are required before selling.
  • STRESS-FREE SELLING PROCESS
    Our hassle-free service keeps the process simple. We handle the details, answer your questions, and focus on customer satisfaction from pickup to payment. One quick call gets the process moving, and your RV gets a new destination while you get paid.

SELL YOUR RV ONLINE VS PRIVATE SALE

If you're looking for the best way to sell RV, the right choice depends on your timeline, the condition of the vehicle, and how much work you want to handle. Many owners compare a RV dealer vs private sale before making a decision. Others choose a cash-buying service to avoid delays and paperwork.
  • SELLING YOUR RV PRIVATELY
    Many people try to sell RV privately through a marketplace such as Craigslist, Facebook Marketplace, or RVTrader. A private buyer might pay more than a trade-in offer, though the process often takes time. You'll need to create listings, answer questions, arrange meetings, and handle title transfer. If your RV has mechanical issues or significant wear, finding the right private buyer often takes longer.
  • SELLING TO AN RV DEALER
    A dealership offers a familiar option for owners who want a straightforward transaction. Many sellers use a trade-in when purchasing another RV. A dealership offer saves time compared with listing the RV online, though the amount offered is often lower because the dealer plans to resell the vehicle.
  • SELLING TO AN RV BUYING SERVICE
    At JunkCarsUs, we buy used, damaged, and junk RVs for cash. We provide a simple quote, arrange pickup, and handle the process without listing fees or meetings with strangers. This option works well for older RVs that are difficult to sell through a marketplace.
  • WHICH OPTION GETS THE BEST VALUE?
    The highest price is not always the best outcome. When comparing a RV dealer vs private sale, consider your time, repair costs, and how quickly you want the RV gone. For many owners, the best way to sell RV is the option that delivers a fair cash offer without weeks of waiting. A quick sale and one less vehicle in the driveway usually feels pretty good.

BEST RV BRANDS WE BUY

At JunkCarsUs, we make it easy to sell an RV for cash. If your camper, travel trailer, luxury motorhome, or older RV is taking up space, we offer cash for RVs in any condition. We buy used RVs, damaged RVs, and junk RVs from many well-known RV manufacturers. Our team keeps the process simple, gives a fair offer, and arranges pickup.

  • WINNEBAGO RVS

    Looking for reliable Winnebago buyers? We purchase Winnebago models that still run, need repairs, or have reached the end of the road. If you want to sell your RV for cash, we are ready to help.

  • KEYSTONE RVS

    Many local owners contact us when they want to sell Keystone camper models. We buy Keystone travel trailers, fifth wheels, and motorhomes, including units with mechanical or cosmetic issues.

  • CLASS C RVS

    We buy Class C RVs from private owners looking for a quick sale. Many sellers contact us when repairs become expensive or storage costs keep adding up.

  • FIFTH WHEELS

    Our team purchases fifth wheel RVs of different ages and sizes. If your fifth wheel needs work or has been parked for years, we are interested.

  • WINNEBAGO RVS

    Looking for reliable Winnebago buyers? We purchase Winnebago models that still run, need repairs, or have reached the end of the road. If you want to sell your RV for cash, we are ready to help.

  • KEYSTONE RVS

    Many local owners contact us when they want to sell Keystone camper models. We buy Keystone travel trailers, fifth wheels, and motorhomes, including units with mechanical or cosmetic issues.

  • CLASS C RVS

    We buy Class C RVs from private owners looking for a quick sale. Many sellers contact us when repairs become expensive or storage costs keep adding up.

  • FIFTH WHEELS

    Our team purchases fifth wheel RVs of different ages and sizes. If your fifth wheel needs work or has been parked for years, we are interested.

READY TO SELL YOUR RV?

If you're ready to sell my RV today, JunkCarsUs makes the process simple. We buy used RVs and junk RVs in almost any condition. Fill out our online form and get RV offer details without wasting time on listings or unanswered messages.

Our team reviews your information and provides a quick quote, free estimate, and immediate offer. If the offer works for you, we arrange same day pickup when available and handle the removal process from start to finish.

Many local residents choose JunkCarsUs when they need an instant cash offer and fast payment for an RV that no longer fits their plans. Whether your RV runs well, needs repairs, or has been sitting for years, we’re ready to help.

GET YOUR FREE RV OFFER TODAY

Send us a few details through our online form and get RV offer information from a real team that values clear communication. JunkCarsUs keeps the process straightforward, with a quick quote, free estimate, fast payment, and an instant cash offer for your RV.

FAQ

  • We are a car recycling service aimed at providing our customers with top-dollar offers and ensuring immediate cash payments. With us, you can junk your car and get money for it within a single day. It’s as easy as a single call!
  • We’ve been buying junk cars for 30 years and have countless happy customers in our portfolio. They readily share their experience with JunkCarsUs on our website. You can check the comments of our real clients in our Testimonials section to make sure you can call us your trusted junk car partner.
  • JunkCarsUs has been on the market for over three decades now. We’ve closed a whole wealth of deals, which is why thousands of people choose to sell their old vehicles with us and get fair money for their junk cars.
  • Every car has value, even if it does not run. We look at the make, model, year, condition, mileage, and current scrap market prices before we make an offer. A wrecked truck and an older sedan will not bring the same amount, though both still have value.
  • We do. JunkCarsUs buys used, damaged, wrecked, and non-running vehicles across the area. We pick up cars from homes, apartments, repair shops, parking lots, and roadside locations.
  • Some states allow junk car sales without a title. Others require one before pickup. Our team checks the rules for your state and explains what paperwork works for your vehicle.
  • Yes. Towing comes with the sale at no extra charge. You do not pay for pickup, even if the car does not start. We like tow trucks more than surprise fees.
  • Yes. We buy cars that do not start, cars with missing parts, flood damage, engine problems, and heavy accident damage.
  • Many pickups happen the same day or the next day, depending on your location and schedule. Payment is made at pickup after the vehicle details are confirmed.
  • Most sales require a title and a photo ID. Some states accept other ownership documents for older vehicles or abandoned cars. Our team explains what applies before pickup is scheduled.
  • Prices depend on the vehicle and current market demand. We work hard to offer fair prices for all vehicle types, from old commuters to damaged SUVs and work trucks.
  • Yes. Expired registration usually does not stop the sale. Proof of ownership still matters, and state rules still apply.
  • Yes. Insurance total-loss vehicles still have value for parts, recycling, or repair. We buy totaled cars in all conditions.
  • Yes. We buy accident-damaged vehicles, flood cars, fire-damaged cars, hail-damaged vehicles, and cars with mechanical problems.
  • Yes. Pickup and towing are included with every qualifying vehicle sale.
  • Yes. Engine damage does not stop the sale. We buy vehicles with blown engines, transmission problems, and major mechanical issues.
  • You send basic details about the car, such as the year, make, model, condition, and location. Our team reviews the information and sends an offer based on current market values.
  • Accurate vehicle details help. If you know the mileage, condition, missing parts, or damage history, share that information upfront. Keeping the title ready also helps speed things up.
  • Yes. Non-running vehicles still have usable parts and recyclable materials, which gives them value.
  • Same-day service is available in many areas when scheduling allows. Contacting us earlier in the day helps move things along faster.
  • Vehicles are recycled, dismantled for usable parts, or sent for scrap processing based on their condition.
  • In most cases, yes. The owner or authorized seller usually needs to sign paperwork and hand over the vehicle.
  • Yes, and you should. Check the glove box, trunk, center console, under the seats, and garage door opener area before pickup. People leave behind some strange stuff. One customer almost sold us their fishing gear and wedding photos in the same trunk.
